flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Southeast Kentucky Community & Technical College are 17% below the public certificate-predominant peer median ($29.5k vs $35.7k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Southeast Kentucky Community & Technical College rose 107% between 2006 and 2009 (20.5% → 42.3%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Southeast Kentucky Community & Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Southeast Kentucky Community & Technical College fell 58% between 2021 and 2024 ($15.2k → $6.4k).
